DemoGuidePage.title: Demo Guide
DemoGuidePage.description: Step-by-step walkthrough of the DeKYC user journey: profile setup, identity verification, permission creation, and service login.
DemoGuidePage.introPoint1: Shows the complete user journey from onboarding to service access
DemoGuidePage.introPoint2: Helps judges follow the product flow in the correct order
DemoGuidePage.introPoint3: Connects user platform, KYC flow, permissions, and service login
DemoGuidePage.introPoint4: Works as a presentation checklist during the demo
DemoGuidePage.progressDescription: This progress reflects the current state of the user platform and readiness for service access.
DemoGuidePage.loadingDescription: The platform is collecting current onboarding and permission state.
DemoGuidePage.guideCompletionSuffix: % of the user journey is currently completed
DemoGuidePage.presentationOrderDescription: For the strongest demo, follow the steps below in order. This keeps both technical and non-technical judges oriented.
DemoGuidePage.noStepsDescription: The guide will appear after platform overview data is loaded.
DemoGuidePage.stepDoneBody: This part of the flow is already completed and ready to demonstrate.
DemoGuidePage.stepPendingBody: This part of the flow still needs to be completed during the demo or setup.
DemoGuidePage.readFlowTitle: How judges should read this flow
DemoGuidePage.readFlowDescription: This sequence shows that DeKYC is not just a technical prototype, but a complete product experience.
DemoGuidePage.readFlowPoint1: The user completes identity onboarding inside the platform
DemoGuidePage.readFlowPoint2: EDS verification produces a reusable KYC profile
DemoGuidePage.readFlowPoint3: Permissions are explicitly granted to a chosen service
DemoGuidePage.readFlowPoint4: The service receives signed KYC access through DeKYC

steps.profileDescription: Configure Biometric Mock and generate your Unique Login Code.
steps.kycDescription: Connect your digital signature and build a verified KYC profile.
steps.permissionsDescription: Choose a service and approve exactly which identity claims it may access.
steps.serviceLoginDescription: Enter the consumer service using Biometric Mock and Unique Login Code.

LandingPage.brandSubtitle: Identity-powered platform for tokenized energy revenue rights
LandingPage.heroLine2: walletless access to tokenized energy rights
LandingPage.heroDescription: DeKYC Energy combines a reusable identity layer with a service for tokenized energy revenue rights. The user logs in through DeKYC, enters ENERGY without a crypto wallet, buys shares of energy projects, receives payouts and trades positions through a built-in OTC marketplace.
LandingPage.layerUserDescription: The user's e-signature is transformed into a tokenized identity, used for authentication, signing and granting scoped access to services.
LandingPage.layerProtocolDescription: Asset catalog, share purchases, revenue epochs, payout claims, portfolio, history and OTC marketplace.
LandingPage.layerServiceDescription: A dedicated share mint for each asset, claim logic, escrow OTC, payout buckets and verifiable tx links on Solana.

OverviewPage.title: Overview
OverviewPage.description: Your DeKYC onboarding progress, readiness status, and quick actions.
OverviewPage.onboardingDescription: Complete the platform setup to use KYC-backed login on consumer services.
OverviewPage.serviceReadinessReady: Your platform account is ready for DeKYC-powered service login.
OverviewPage.serviceReadinessPending: Complete biometric setup, login code issuance, and KYC verification to unlock service login.
OverviewPage.accountStatusDescription: Main platform states that affect KYC and service access.
OverviewPage.quickActionsDescription: Fastest path to complete onboarding and create permissions.
OverviewPage.openProfileDescription: Set mock biometric and issue your unique login code.
OverviewPage.openKycDescription: Bind EDS and review your verified KYC profile.
OverviewPage.openPermissionsDescription: Grant scoped access to a selected consumer service.
OverviewPage.openConsumerServiceDescription: Login to a service using DeKYC (biometric + login code).
OverviewPage.snapshotDescription: Most recent user-facing KYC and protocol readiness summary.
OverviewPage.howItWorksDescription: End-to-end DeKYC flow demonstrated in this platform.
OverviewPage.howItWorks2: 2. Bind EDS and generate KYC profile

ProfilePage.title: Profile
ProfilePage.description: Your platform account, onboarding status, and KYC readiness.
ProfilePage.accountSummaryDescription: This section shows your account identity and onboarding state.
ProfilePage.onboardingStatusDescription: You must configure biometric mock before connecting EDS.
ProfilePage.biometricSetupDescription: Configure mock face identity before connecting EDS and using service login.
ProfilePage.biometricSetupBody: Add your biometric mock profile to enable digital signature verification and service login.
ProfilePage.biometricAlreadyAddedWarning: Your biometric mock is already configured. Rebinding is not available in the current product flow.
ProfilePage.loginCodeDescription: This code is used together with mock face login on the consumer service.
ProfilePage.configureBiometricFirst: Configure biometric mock first to enable login code issuance.
ProfilePage.latestKycSnapshotDescription: Your latest KYC profile extracted from EDS and protocol derivation.
ProfilePage.noKycProfileYet: No KYC profile yet. Configure biometric mock, then connect EDS.
ProfilePage.faceScanDescription: Please place your face inside the frame. The scan will complete automatically.

PlatformKycPage.title: KYC
PlatformKycPage.description: Connect your digital signature and review your verified KYC profile.
PlatformKycPage.gatingDescription: Biometric setup must be completed before your digital signature can be connected.
PlatformKycPage.gatingBody: Biometric setup is complete. You can now connect your digital signature and complete identity verification.
PlatformKycPage.afterVerificationHint: After successful verification, your KYC profile will be filled automatically.
PlatformKycPage.rebindWarning: Your digital signature is already connected. Rebinding is not available in the current product flow.
PlatformKycPage.signatureConnectedSuccess: Digital signature connected successfully. Your KYC profile was updated.
PlatformKycPage.ncaLayerNotRunning: NCALayer is not running. Please start NCALayer first and try again.
PlatformKycPage.verifiedProfileDescription: This is the user-facing KYC snapshot extracted after EDS verification.
PlatformKycPage.noKycProfileDescription: Complete biometric setup and connect your EDS first. After verification, your user-facing KYC profile will appear here.
PlatformKycPage.securityDescription: KYC is stored off-chain in encrypted form. On-chain only permission state is recorded.

PlatformPermissionsPage.title: Permissions
PlatformPermissionsPage.description: Choose a service and approve exactly which KYC data it may access.
PlatformPermissionsPage.createPermissionDescription: Required claims are enforced by the service. Optional claims are your choice.
PlatformPermissionsPage.activePermissionWarning: You already have an active permission for this service. Revoke it first if you want to create a new one.
PlatformPermissionsPage.revokeBeforeCreateError: Revoke the active permission before creating a new one.
PlatformPermissionsPage.grantAccessHint: Required claims are enforced by the selected service. Optional claims are shared only if you approve them.
PlatformPermissionsPage.permissionLifecycleDescription: Required claims are enforced by the service, optional claims are chosen by the user, and protocol thresholds are generated automatically.
PlatformPermissionsPage.yourPermissionsDescription: Here you can review and revoke the permissions you have granted.
PlatformPermissionsPage.noPermissionsDescription: Choose a service above and grant your first scoped permission.
